params.value: SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, IsWon, Amount, dateTimestampContractreceived__c, CloseDate, RecordType.Name FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = true AND dateTimestampContractreceived__c >= LAST_N_DAYS:90 AND OwnerId IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000005SxezIAC','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE') ORDER BY OwnerId, dateTimestampContractreceived__c DESC LIMIT 1000
